title: DenseContextQuantTrim 8xH100: 1.1779 val_bpb
body:
## Summary

`DenseContextQuantTrim 8xH100` is a clean under-cap `8xH100` submission snapshot with `1.17787170 val_bpb`.

## Approach Notes

- dense baseline-family trainer
- `TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048`
- sliding-window validation at `VAL_CONTEXT_LEN=2048`, `VAL_SLIDE_TOKENS=512`
- clip-search PTQ
- hybrid `fp16/int8` token embedding export
- no tokenizer changes
- no test-time training
- no stateful evaluation path in the submitted run
- no int6 or QAT path

## Result

- Final exact metrics from `train.log`:
  - `final_pre_quant_exact val_bpb: 1.17469015`
  - `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb: 1.17787170`
- Final artifact sizes from `train.log`:
  - `Serialized model int8+zlib: 15919719 bytes`
  - `Total submission size int8+zlib: 15981108 bytes`
- Final wallclock from `train.log`:
  - `wallclock_seconds: 594.025`
